items.author: rlaw
items.title: Awful charge quality
items.content: Sound is really good I bought two of them but also I have to charge them so much. I'm used to jbl which sounds better is more reliable and the charge lasts for years. Unfortunately jbl lost their commitment to quality do I have to buy Chinese trash like this.

items.author: Mike S.
items.title: Survived being left outside for a week in multiple thunderstorms
items.content:
I bought this as a gift and the recipient took it out by the pool and listened to music with it for hours. The sound is fantastic, rich base and clean vocals. The recipient absolutely loves it.

Today, more than a week later and after multiple violent thunder storms, we went out to clean up the pool deck for a pool party we are going to have today, we saw the speaker still sitting outside and imagined that it was completely ruined after only one day’s use.

I went back to the Amazon product page where I had purchased this, looked through all of the features and was cautiously optimistic after having read that it is waterproof, can be floated on water and wouldn’t be affected by rain.
We powered it up and just as promised in the features, the thing came to life and played just fine. What a fantastic speaker!

It’s just exactly the right size, the handle is nice for grabbing it up and moving it around and the sound is great for a speaker this size.
I love that they can survive the heat, the sun and multiple thunderstorms. Not that we will continue to treat it that way, but it’s nice to know that it can survive if you accidentally leave it out in the weather.

items.author: Hardy Sellers
items.title: Beware
items.content: Battery dead less than a year. Beware.

items.author: Bits N' Pieces
items.title: Blew away my expectations!
items.content: I was sceptical about this bluetooth speaker's power and ability to fill a room with sound, when i first saw reviews of it on youtube, but after hearing it in person now and tweaking EQ settings a bit more to my liking on the soundcore app, the Soudcore Boom 2 is freaking amazing! Not only is it light weight and portable, but it really packs a puch when listening to music and watching movies! Im really tempted to buy a 2nd one now to have True Wireless Stereo! Its an amazing bluetooth speaker for its price point!

items.author: Norm Mock
items.title: Just wow!!!
items.content: I bought these for my room this speaker is hands down the best Bluetooth speaker I have for under 100 dollars is insane

items.author: Amanda
items.title: Yes! This is the one!
items.content: This thing is tough, sounds amazing and is definitely water proof! My teenager and his friends love it! The lights are fun as well.

items.author: Stacy O.
items.title: Great speaker for the price
items.content: Great little Bluetooth speaker. Great sound quality that's plenty loud enough. I have older speakers from another big name brand (with higher price tag). This speaker performs as good, if not better. I've only had it a few months, but battery lasts a very long time. Definitely staying with Anker.

items.author: Veronica Grimsley
items.title: Great traveling companion
items.content: Great sound, only thing missing is USB outlet

items.author: Southpaw
items.title: Not compatible with older model
items.content: This speaker will not pair with any previous model. Very misleading considering its the same sku.

items.author: Paul Hansen
items.title: Seriously impressive
items.content: For $85 on sale, this thing is an absolute steal. Clarity and bass are top tier and far superior to what Sony or UE offers at this price point.

items.author: Joanna
items.title: Amazing sound quality and portability!
items.content: Wow! I just ordered this for $85 and I’m blown away. This sounds better than any of the smaller Bose speakers I’ve had over the years. It has plenty of base and I can’t imagine most people ever needing anything louder. I think it looks nice, and the lights are sort of cool, although I don’t imagine I’ll use them much. The fact it’s fairly small and waterproof only adds to the value. I also just saw you can pair two speakers together to get stereo sound with separate right and left channels! Most people may not care about this but for me having portable stereo sound would be amazing. l just ordered a second one and I’ll update after I try it. No matter what happens, this is a steal at $85 and probably still a bargain at regular price.

items.author: Dean A. Smith
items.title: Versatile speaker and great sound
items.content: Solid speaker with good volume and bass. I tried it with metal and bluegrass and they both sound great. The speaker is light and easily carried with the handle being a nice touch. It will be great for the beach and pool.

items.author: Deep Thoughts
items.title: Doesn’t work with Partycast.
items.content: ***Model received uses new Auracast, doesn’t connect to Partycast systems like Boom 2 Plus. Go figure.

items.author: Aqua_Mint480
items.title: Quality sound
items.content: Loud and clear, Bass is great. Worth the money, doesn't sound cheap or like it's running out of breath. Got it for shower time and game room cause GTA never has good tunes lol.

items.author: Moe
items.title: Excellent Sound & Speaker
items.content: Beast of a wireless speaker. Make sure to download the soundcore app for it, set the EQ settings to make it crisper, or else you’re going to be stuck with flatter sound. Check the video for the sound quality!

items.author: Eric
items.title: GOOD BASS GOOD VIBES
items.content: 10/10 good base felt even when low volume and it floats grab it durring a sale and you won't be disappointed use it for music in the dish pit at work and its fantastic

items.author: John M
items.title: Fair price for a really good speaker.
items.content: Awesome for $89 bucks! I was always impressed with other Anker products so took a chance on this speaker. I needed something to throw on the deck when I'm grilling and this thing pumps. Bass is good. Sound quality is good. Only thing I have to compare it to, is an old bose SoundLink mini (which impressed the hell out of me) and this Anker is similar in sound quality with the ability to get louder.

items.author: Jeff Coe
items.title: Enjoy this speaker
items.content: I was not sure for I have a Bose Sound Link. But it came unpacked and turned it on. Wow there is a lot of sound and a lot of bass. I've now had it for over a month and the sound is even better. Thinking about buying another one so we would have the full stereo affect.

items.author: Ray jagger
items.title: Good Party speaker
items.content: Works well as small party speaker

items.author: J. mcCoy
items.title: Amazing! Buy one!
items.content: I play bass guitar in the praise and worship team at my church. I bought this Bluetooth speaker for working up set songs. I cannot believe what I got for the price. The bass is super clear and punchy. It blows the JBL I’ve been using for years away. It is going to make working up songs so much easier because I can hear the bass so well. Buy one!
